title: Gander's Goofy Mod
description:
Some goofy ideas goobers (chat) gave me on youtube, I coded all the ideas and want to share them with the world!


Made on Mcreator.
body:
A chaotic mod made by me, and inspired by my viewers. 

- My **first ever mod!** 
- Has all the necessities to a mod, goldfish, taxes, sheep portals, etc!
  
-  For the moment, all of the playable items are in creative, besides the hot dog item.

# Watch the video below to see all the mod items in action!
 
  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ShE5DLSN94U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

=============================================================================

#                       📃 Includes the following :
==============================================================================
1. 🐟 Goldfish item, when eaten a horde of goldfish spawn that bite you back!

2. This Mod adds a **tax collector villager**, when you decline to pay your taxes it spawns inside that block if you accept to pay your taxes, it will take diamonds out of your inventory, more changes to this feature are most likely coming in the future! Also in this feature when you kill the tax collector, you can obtain the tax block, a workstation for vanilla villagers to make you pay taxes!

3. 🥔 Adds a radioactive potato, explodes when eaten.

4. 🧟+🐟 Adds a zombie fish item, when eaten, another horde of fish, but this time they are zombies and they can eliminate the player in one hit.

5. 🐏 Adds the Sheep_ mob, doesn't do much besides just sit around and baa, but with wool from a normal sheep, and a lehoootdooog ingniter, you can make a portal (lehoootdoog item is only in creative with no recipe for at the momment).

6. 🌭 Adds a hot dog item, literally just a hot dog that has a good amount of saturation. (with a hot dog effect that I will add to the hot dog item in a later version :D) You can craft this item with 2 bread and 1 porkchop.
==========================================================================
#                       ✅ **Plans on things to add in the future**
__________________________________________________________________________

- Craftable recipes to all items (all items are creative only for the momment)
- Hot dog effect to the hot dog item.
- Tax feature will tax (take the block) on all blocks!

==========================================================================
# ✅ Why you should download this mod ❌
__________________________________________________________________________

You should download this mod, because first of all, this is my first mod ever made! 
(That one was petty I know) But second is that if you like a chaotic mess, and exploding potatoes, this is the right mod for you!
Third and final reason, real people inspired (commented on a youtube community post) me to make this mod with their ideas!

==========================================================================

# 📃**_NOTE_** ( Client side and server side are supported! )

==========================================================================

💖 Thank you for checking out this mod! I would appreciate it if you shared it with other people!
